description: A taxpayer made contributions to a Health Savings Account (HSA) and wants to claim the deduction.

nodes.task_description: Gather information on the taxpayer's HSA contributions from Form 5498-SA and W-2.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects all relevant HSA data.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the total contributions do not exceed the annual limit.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the contributions are within the legal limits.

nodes.task_description: Prepare Form 8889 to report the HSA activity and calculate the deduction.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately calculates the HSA deduction.
